name: Erin James
title: Program Director
notes: Met at VA Industry Day April 3 via warm intro from CloudBridge Federal. Emphasized cloud security, veteran UX, and implementation risk as top evaluation discriminators.

name: Michael Chen
title: Contracting Officer Representative – Technical Authority
notes: Priya Nair has a standing working relationship with Michael from a prior CMS engagement. Technical authority on the BCMS modernization effort.

name: Sandra Patel
title: Contracting Officer
notes: No direct CO relationship confirmed yet. Targeted outreach planned for May 2026.

name: Tom Reynolds
title: Program Manager
notes: Prior relationship from a 2023 CISA engagement. Key contact for the DHS CSOC Modernization opportunity.

name: Sarah Johnson
title: Program Manager
notes: Key decision maker for cloud initiatives at DISA. Met through the JEDI program support engagement. Strong advocate for Zero Trust architecture and FedRAMP High-authorized solutions.

name: Mike Chen
title: Technical Lead
notes: Technical requirements owner for DoD cloud migration initiative. Focused on multi-cloud architecture, data encryption, and 24/7 NOC requirements. Worked with our team on a prior DISA engagement.

name: Priya Nair
title: Program Lead
notes: Established relationship from the Beneficiary Data Platform engagement. Key internal Apex contact and CMS point of relationship for the Medicaid Enterprise Systems opportunity.

name: James Whitfield
title: Deputy Director, IT Modernization
notes: Champion for agile and human-centered design within TTS. Introduced through the 18F Fellowship network. Very receptive to SDVOSB primes — has pushed back on large-business consolidation in past acquisitions. Good contact for OASIS+ task order pursuits.

name: Diane Foster
title: Contracting Officer
agency: Department of Health and Human Services
notes: CO on the HHS Unified Data Platform vehicle. Responsive and process-oriented — prefers early market research engagement before RFP release. Reached via the SAMHSA industry outreach session in March.

name: Ramon Castillo
title: Enterprise Architect
notes: Technical evaluator for DOE zero-trust and OT/IT convergence efforts. Met at CyberSat Summit 2025. Influential in shaping SOW language — worth engaging early on any DOE cyber opportunity.

name: Lisa Monroe
title: Program Executive Officer
notes: PEO for several NAVSEA modernization programs. Strong advocate for cloud-native approaches and DevSecOps. Connected through a shared teaming relationship with Booz Allen. Prior engagement helped shape the digital engineering roadmap deliverable — she cited it in a public briefing.

name: Kevin O'Malley
title: Acquisition Program Manager
notes: Intro via FEMA industry day. Newer contact — low engagement so far. Manages a grants management modernization initiative expected to be competed under CIO-SP4 in late 2026. Follow-up planned after next industry day.

name: Angela Kim
title: Director, Digital Services
notes: Long-standing relationship going back to the SSA My Social Security modernization. Angela is an internal champion for our accessibility-first approach and has referenced our UX work in multiple acquisition briefings. Critical contact for any SSA digital services pursuit.

name: David Okafor
title: IT Program Manager
notes: Manages the NIH research computing and data platform portfolio. Met at the NIH Research IT Symposium. Interested in FedRAMP Moderate cloud solutions and HPC workload migration. Potential for a SEWP V task order in Q3 2026.
